privacy: Template only. Do not commit Denise's real medication schedule, doses, or exact medication timing unless intentionally making a private repo and accepting the risk.

medications.purpose: Pain / clot prevention / nausea / constipation / antibiotic / stomach protection
medications.directions: Copy exact bottle-label directions here in the private tracker only

medications.stopRule: Until gone / X days / as directed
